sections.paragraph:
- Original: σημαίνω

- Transliteration: Semaino

- Phonetic: say-mah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to give a sign, to signify, indicate

2. to make known

- Origin: from sema (a mark, of uncertain derivation)

- TDNT entry: 11:22,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From σῆμα sē ma (a mark; of uncertain derivation); to indicate: - signify.
